infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aura uses your camera for the verified-human selfie check and your video introductions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aura records audio for your video introduction and liveness video.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Aura needs photo access so you can upload profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddOnlyUsageDescription: Aura saves photos to your library when you ask.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Aura uses your location to show real walking distance to your matches and venues.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Aura adds confirmed dates to your calendar so you never miss one.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Aura adds confirmed dates to your calendar with reminders.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Aura uses Face ID to verify you're a real human.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Aura to use Face ID to authenticate you.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Aura to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Aura to use your camera for the verified-human selfie check and video introductions.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Aura to use your microphone so your video introduction has sound.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Aura uses your location to compute walking distance to matches and date venues across London.

plugins.calendarPermission: Aura adds confirmed dates to your calendar with reminders.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Aura uses Face ID to verify you're a real human.
